Package com.rhlowery.acs.service

Interface IdentityProvider

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractMockIdp, AzureAdIdentityProvider, GenericOidcIdentityProvider, GenericSamlIdentityProvider, MockIdentityProvider, OktaIdentityProvider
public interface IdentityProvider
Interface for 3rd-party identity providers.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Map<String,Object>>
    authenticate(Map<String,Object> credentials)
    Authenticates a user against the 3rd-party provider.
    default void
    clear()
    Resets the provider state (for tests).
    List<String>
    getGroups(String userId)
    Retrieves group memberships for a user from the provider.
    String
    getId()
     
    String
    getName()
     
    String
    getType()
     

  • Method Details

    • getId

      String getId()
      Returns:
      Unique identifier for this provider.

    • getName

      String getName()
      Returns:
      Human-readable name of the provider.

    • getType

      String getType()
      Returns:
      The type of provider (e.g., OIDC, SAML, ActiveDirectory).

    • authenticate

      Optional<Map<String,Object>> authenticate(Map<String,Object> credentials)
      Authenticates a user against the 3rd-party provider.
      Parameters:
      credentials - Map of credentials (e.g., username/password or external token).
      Returns:
      Map containing user information if successful.

    • getGroups

      List<String> getGroups(String userId)
      Retrieves group memberships for a user from the provider.
      Parameters:
      userId - The unique identifier of the user.
      Returns:
      List of groups the user belongs to.

    • clear

      default void clear()
      Resets the provider state (for tests).
